text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Australia/Sydney is UTC + 10, so the time difference is 20 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 21:00 + 20 hours = 17:00 (next day).
3. Adjust the date: September 23 + 1 day = September 24.
FINAL_ANSWER: 17:00 on September 24, 1118
